stemHtml: Which of the following is the purpose of a mach trim system?

options.a: To create an automatic trim response as the aircraft’s CG moves when passing through the transonic speed regime.
options.b: Preventing the aircraft trim from moving in response to entering the transonic speed regime.
options.c: Preventing the aircraft from having a nose-down moment.
options.d: Preventing the aircraft from having a nose-up moment.
